assets.description: Container metadata object for scripts, metadata, and tags

team.description: Joint user emails participating in this project

ownerId.description: Associated owner Firebase Auth user identifier

Presence.title: User Presence
Presence.description: Real-time active project collaborator check-in state

userId.description: Unique user email or active key

VoiceProfile.title: Voice Profile
VoiceProfile.description: Custom recorded or uploaded voice fingerprint with AI tone classification tags

id.description: Unique identifier of the voice profile

name.description: Human-readable name assigned to the voice profile

mimeType.description: MIME type format of the reference audio

tags.description: Descriptive aesthetic classifications like professional or conversational

description.description: AI predicted voice timbre summary sentence

MasteringPreset.title: Mastering Preset
MasteringPreset.description: Custom compression, noise reduction threshold, and peak normalizations settings

id.description: Unique identifier of the mastering preset

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Real-time task and render status alerts

userId.description: Associated user email or token identifier

title.description: The visual title header of the alert

message.description: Short explanation body of the state update

type.description: Alert mood type, like success, warning, or info

status.description: Notification read status like read or unread

link.description: Target suite panel navigation route reference

/projects/{projectId}.description: Collaborative project files synchronized across teammates

/projects/{projectId}/presence/{userId}.description: Dynamic online user markers with active panel locations

/voice_profiles/{profileId}.description: Custom synthesized voice profiles loaded by creator accounts

/mastering_presets/{presetId}.description: Custom mastering presets defined by creators

/notifications/{notificationId}.description: Real-time system actions, renders, and task alert channels
